title: selaginella leoneensis
intro: Selaginella leoneensis is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella leoneensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
